task_completion.description: Create a Fiscal Position named 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' that maps default sales taxes to none.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Fiscal Position configuration screen showing the name 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' and a Tax Mapping where a default tax (e.g., 15% or similar) is mapped to an empty or 'None' tax to apply.

task_completion.description: Create a customer record for 'Green Earth Foundation' with the specified address, email, and phone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Contact/Customer form for 'Green Earth Foundation' with the Company radio button selected. The address should be '742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704', email 'accounting@greenearthfoundation.org', and phone '(217) 555-0142'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' fiscal position to the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Sales & Purchase' tab (or similar accounting settings tab) on the 'Green Earth Foundation' customer form. The 'Fiscal Position' field must be set to 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit'.

task_completion.description: Create a Sales Order for the customer with the correct products and quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order with 'Green Earth Foundation' as the customer. The order lines must include 'Organic Compost Bin - Large' with a quantity of 10, and 'Solar-Powered Garden Light Set' with a quantity of 5.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Sales Order calculates zero tax due to the fiscal position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the totals section at the bottom of the Sales Order. The 'Taxes' amount should be $0.00 (or empty), indicating the tax exemption was successfully applied.
Look for the status indicator on the Sales Order. It should show 'Sales Order' (or a confirmed state) rather than 'Quotation'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Odoo graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface being navigated (e.g., Contacts, Invoicing/Accounting, and Sales apps) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent should not use direct database queries or python scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql, sqlite3, or python scripts executing database inserts/updates should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent must actually enter the data into the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of forms being filled out (typing in names, addresses, selecting dropdowns) rather than instantly appearing via a script or browser console manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: 'Green Earth Foundation'. Fiscal Position Name: 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit'. Product 1: 'Organic Compost Bin - Large' (Qty: 10). Product 2: 'Solar-Powered Garden Light Set' (Qty: 5). Expected Tax on Sales Order: $0.00. The customer address is '742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704'.
